rules.cssText: .framer-ITaV3 .framer-x82rmh { width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 80px; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-10pgtcn { width: 668px; max-width: 929px; height: 376px; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: calc(50% - 334px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-8rjsk4 { filter: blur(19px); border-radius: 79%; width: 831px; height: 23px; top: 143px; left: 2px; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-ffes65 { filter: blur(32px); border-radius: 79%; width: 533px; height: 13px; top: 148px; left: 152px; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1efgymg { filter: blur(5px); border-radius: 79%; width: 506px; height: 13px; top: 148px; left: calc(50.0469% - 253.15px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1r1clni { filter: blur(9px); border-radius: 79%; width: 363px; height: 4px; top: 153px; left: calc(50.0469% - 181.72px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1ro5wqn { border-radius: 79%; width: 508px; height: 2px; top: 155px; left: calc(49.9687% - 254.07px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1h6x12y { filter: blur(106px); border-radius: 79%; width: 837px; height: 312px; top: calc(50% - 156.21px); }

.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1r98zc4 { align-content: unset; align-items: unset; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(0px, 1fr)); grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(50px, 1fr)); grid-auto-rows: minmax(0px, 1fr); justify-content: center; display: grid; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1jlfbfj { flex-direction: column; align-content: center; align-items: center; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-792dmu { flex: 0 0 auto; align-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-8rjsk4 { filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 40%; width: 137px; height: 12px; top: calc(49.569% - 5.81px); left: calc(50% - 68.34px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-ffes65 { filter: blur(16px); border-radius: 40%; width: 129px; height: 7px; top: calc(49.569% - 3.405px); left: calc(50% - 64.335px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1efgymg { filter: blur(3px); opacity: 0.1; border-radius: 40%; width: 129px; height: 7px; top: calc(49.569% - 3.405px); left: calc(50% - 64.335px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1r1clni { filter: blur(2px); border-radius: 40%; width: 120px; height: 0px; top: 49.1379%; left: calc(50% - 60.125px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1ro5wqn { border-radius: 40%; width: 112px; height: 0px; top: calc(49.569% - 0.2px); left: calc(50% - 56.115px); }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1h6x12y { filter: blur(54px); border-radius: 40%; width: 100%; height: 60px; top: calc(50% - 30.065px); left: 0%; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1kf2cq6 { flex-direction: column; align-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 40px; width: 100%; padding: 80px 24px; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-e4vm { top: unset; flex: 0 0 auto; align-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; position: relative; }

.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1r98zc4 { align-content: unset; align-items: unset; grid-template-rows: repeat(2, minmax(0px, 1fr)); grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(50px, 1fr)); grid-auto-rows: minmax(0px, 1fr); justify-content: center; display: grid; }

.framer-ITaV3 .framer-7sgcxe, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-2fod6s, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-fbnxu8, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-1v4qfi7, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-71n6t4 { align-content: center; place-self: start; align-items: center; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-1t5wid1 { border-radius: unset; will-change: unset; gap: 50px; width: 100%; padding: 80px 16px 0px; }

.framer-ITaV3 .framer-792dmu, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-1roaz88, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-yzccyv, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-1s2umet, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-qlx46m, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-qegu10, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-1p6rc7m, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-1o95cbe, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-aafxfv, .framer-ITaV3 .framer-ng6jye { flex: 0 0 auto; align-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-m31mue { bottom: unset; height: var(--framer-aspect-ratio-supported,217px); top: -74px; left: -10px; right: -24px; }
.framer-ITaV3 .framer-15nod7u { flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; height: 961px; top: calc(2.76484% - 480.5px); }
